global_description: A small, compact songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a distinctive blue-gray head, white underparts, and olive-green back. The wings and tail are dark with two white wing bars, and the eyes are surrounded by a white ring.

part_details.head: Blue-gray, rounded with a prominent white eye ring.
part_details.wings: Dark with two distinct white bars, medium length.
part_details.tail: Short, dark, matching the wings in color.

spatial_relations: The blue-gray head is positioned above the white underparts.
The olive-green back extends from the head to the tail.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, featuring white bars.
The white eye ring encircles the eyes on the blue-gray head.
